【氪命+肝苟】
“一曲肝肠断，天涯何处觅知音？”
开局穿越成瞎子，成为街头卖唱。
【二泉映月：LV2（1/10000）
作用：疏通气血，疏通经络、祛湿暖身】
.........
他是街头卖唱的瞎子，为一文钱灭掉整个帮派。
是整日睡在破庙的烂酒鬼。
皇朝崩坏，各地群雄割据，门派独立。
帮派相互征伐，九州混乱不堪。
一个卖艺的瞎子游走在其中，谱写着一段不为人知的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dc4c7fd3edc095ffd8107debbfac0006","author":"哀嚎的狂风","author_id":"","book_id":"7180330734979124256","book_name":"玄幻：成为瞎子，我游历江湖","book_short_name":"落魄江湖行","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"28.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7180332106881761847","read_count":"286360","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1677157"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"816","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,开局,东方玄幻,打脸,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/387b3dac068c110417
